name: Context Visualizer Dashboard
note: Shows one badge per prompt slot with a bar chart and approximate token count. Each colon = ~1000 chars (~250 tokens). Click any badge to refresh.

rules.name: Context Visualizer Dashboard
rules.note: Step 1 — snapshot all non-history slots plus a merged Chat History row in prompt order. Step 2 — find the longest label so all bars align. Step 3 — render each slot as a padded bar with approximate token count.

actions.note: ST represents chat history in two ways. 'newMainChat' is the full raw history buffer shown in the preset menu — it is never sent to the LLM and is excluded here. 'chatHistory-N' slots are the individual turns actually sent to the LLM in this generation (visible in Prompt Itemization as 'Chat History'). The sub= parameter collapses all chatHistory-N turns into a single 'Chat History' row at the position they occupy in the prompt stack, so the order matches the real prompt layout.
Length of the longest non-history slot display name. Used to align bar columns. 'Chat History' (12 chars) is shorter than most slot names so it pads correctly without being included here.
Each line becomes one badge chip. Labels padded to name_pad chars so bars align. Each colon = ~1000 chars (~250 tokens). ~Ntk shows approximate token count (chars / 4).
